policy.collection_pattern: daily point-in-time vintages, per-source commits, strict JSON, cache-first and bounded retries

active_daily_sources.source: Yahoo Finance via existing yfinance dependency
active_daily_sources.limitations: unofficial best-effort feed; current symbol directory is the authority for ticker validity

active_daily_sources.source: FINRA Reg SHO Daily Short Sale Volume
active_daily_sources.limitations: not short interest and not consolidated exchange volume

active_daily_sources.source: US House Clerk Financial Disclosure Index
active_daily_sources.limitations: index metadata only: identifies disclosure documents but does not parse every attachment, transaction, or holding

active_daily_sources.source: SEC EDGAR daily index and 13F filings
active_daily_sources.pacing: identified user agent, at most 10 requests/second; collector uses far less

active_daily_sources.cache: one bounded page per daily vintage

active_daily_sources.source: Yahoo earnings calendar fallback + local DoltHub calendar

existing_offline_research_sources.source: ThetaData bulk intraday quotes already on disk
existing_offline_research_sources.coverage: 15172 parquet files; 3264 earnings events; 174 symbols; 2020-01-22 through 2026-05-21

existing_offline_research_sources.source: DoltHub/free EOD option chains already on disk

useful_not_active.source: CFTC Commitments of Traders historical compressed files
useful_not_active.reason: useful macro regime feature but futures-level, not needed to repair Iron Wing equity coverage
daily filing discovery is active; bulk fundamentals are the next incremental backfill, not required for the options verdict

explicitly_excluded.reason: existing paid/licensed endpoint timed out and made the old daily transaction fragile; deliberately excluded rather than pretending the House metadata index is an equivalent transaction-level replacement
no API credential is configured; Yahoo plus the local Dolt calendar currently covers the required fixed universe
not justified while 15172 historical files are already local and the free forward ledger has zero completable events
